query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as ativos_com_endereco_invalido FROM establishments WHERE status = 'active' AND address NOT REGEXP '^(Rua|Avenida|Alameda|Praça|Travessa|Largo|Estrada|Rodovia|Viela)';

SELECT COUNT(*) as ativos_total FROM establishments WHERE status = 'active';
